chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-2867 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13001/2025 2. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025. Mr.Ali Asadullah Bullo, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ According to the learned counsel for the petitioner Government of Sindh is in the process of Constitutional Committee to initiate the process of regularization of contract employees. Once such policy has been finalized the petitioner would be at liberty to make his representation which is at page 167 yo 183 of the File, which shall be decided in accordance with the relevant Policy, Rules & Regulation. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
